heroTitle: Phones, PCs, tablets, and accessories delivered with cash on delivery to all 58 wilayas.
heroDescription: A multilingual storefront built for Algerian customers with a clear checkout and reliable order tracking.

earnMoneyTitle: Turn your audience into income with VisaStore
earnMoneyDescription: Share your personal referral link with friends and followers. Every time someone buys through your link, you earn a commission - no investment, no stock, no risk.
earnMoneyStep1Description: Register in seconds and get your unique referral link and promo codes from your dashboard.
earnMoneyStep2Description: Post your link on social media, groups, or send it directly to friends and family.
earnMoneyStep3Description: Earn a commission on every delivered order placed through your link, then request a withdrawal anytime.
earnMoneyCtaDescription: Join hundreds of affiliates already earning with VisaStore. It only takes a minute to get started.
earnMoneyWhyTitle: Why this works for small affiliates
earnMoneyHighlight1Description: You only share links and promo codes. The store handles products, delivery, and customer follow-up.
earnMoneyHighlight2Description: Your dashboard shows clicks, orders, commissions, and withdrawal history in one place.
earnMoneyHighlight3Description: Useful for students, local pages, and niche communities that want simple extra income.
adminPromoCodeFieldToggle: Show promo code field at checkout

productViewingNow: people are viewing this right now
productAiDescription: The assistant answers only with real product data. If data is missing, it says so clearly.
productSupportNote: Need more details? Our team can confirm stock and delivery before dispatch.
wishlistDescription: Products you've saved for later — tap the heart icon on any product to add or remove it here.
wishlistEmptyDescription: Tap the heart icon on a product card or product page to save it here for later.
cartDescription: Review your items before continuing to checkout.

checkoutHintFullName: Example: Ahmed Benali — please use your real name

aiHint: Reply with confirmation or ask to change delivery details before the order is approved.

orderSuccessDescription: Your order was received and reviewed. Our team will call you shortly to confirm the details before it ships.

adminPromoAffiliateHint: Assign this code to a specific affiliate to track their referral sales, or leave it general for all customers.

affiliateWithdrawalDescription: Submit payout details for approved balance only.
affiliateCommissionRule: Commission is counted only after delivered or picked up orders.
affiliateCancelledRule: Cancelled, returned, and failed orders do not count.
affiliateAccountInfoCardlessHint: Enter your national ID number and withdrawal PIN
affiliateVoucherHint: Use this code and PIN to collect your cash. It is valid for 7 days.
affiliateProductsDescription: Share these product links with your referral code attached and earn commission on every sale.
affiliateNoProducts: No products are open for affiliate promotion yet.

affiliateReferralBonusHint: You earn {amount} for each new affiliate's first sale.
affiliateCouponReason: Why do you need this coupon?

notFoundDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist or may have been moved. Check the address or head back to a page you know.
privacyPolicyBody:
{store} respects your privacy and is committed to protecting the personal information you share with us.

When you place an order, we collect information such as your name, phone number, delivery address, and email address. This information is used solely to process and deliver your order, provide customer support, and communicate with you about your purchase.

We do not sell or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your information with delivery partners and payment processors only to the extent necessary to fulfill your order.

We take reasonable measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.

You may contact us at any time to ask what information we hold about you, to correct it, or to request that it be deleted.
termsBody:
By using {store} and placing an order, you agree to the following terms.

All products are subject to availability. We reserve the right to limit quantities, refuse orders, or cancel orders at our discretion, for example in cases of suspected fraud or pricing errors.

Prices, promotions, and product descriptions are subject to change without prior notice. We make every effort to display accurate information, but errors may occasionally occur.

For cash-on-delivery orders, payment is due at the time of delivery. Please ensure someone is available to receive and pay for the order at the address provided.

Delivery times are estimates and may vary depending on your location and courier availability. {store} is not responsible for delays caused by circumstances beyond our control.

If you participate in our affiliate program, you agree to promote {store} honestly and in accordance with the program rules. Commissions are calculated and paid according to the terms presented in your affiliate dashboard.

We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the site after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
adminNoCommissionsForAffiliate: This affiliate has no recorded commissions yet.
returnPolicyBody:
Your satisfaction matters to us. If you are not happy with your order, you may request a return or exchange within 7 days of delivery.

To be eligible for a return, items must be unused, in their original packaging, and in the same condition that you received them.

To start a return, please contact us through the Contact page with your order number and the reason for the return. Our team will guide you through the next steps.

Once your return is received and inspected, we will notify you of the approval or rejection of your refund or exchange. Approved refunds are processed within a reasonable timeframe using the original payment method or store credit, depending on the order.

Items that are damaged due to misuse, missing parts, or returned without prior contact may not be eligible for a refund.

If you receive a damaged, defective, or incorrect item, please contact us as soon as possible so we can resolve the issue quickly.
adminAdminsDescription: Create sub-admin accounts and choose which dashboard sections each one can access.
adminNewPasswordOptional: New password (leave empty to keep current)
adminConfirmDeleteSubAdmin: Delete this sub-admin account? This cannot be undone.
